routes.description: NativeWrap proof route: ETH -> WETH -> FAME.

candidateSummary: Wraps native ETH into canonical Base WETH before using existing WETH -> FAME liquidity.

routes.description: Reverse composed production route: ETH -> ZORA -> basedflick -> FAME.

candidateSummary: Uses the pinned ETH -> ZORA fixture minimum, then router-computed All mode for downstream hops.

routes.description: Composed production route: FAME -> basedflick -> ZORA -> ETH.

candidateSummary: Uses router-computed All mode for the final ZORA -> ETH V4 hop.

routes.description: Composed production route: FAME -> basedflick -> ZORA -> USDC.

candidateSummary: Uses pinned single-leg FAME -> basedflick output as the exact V4 input amount.

routes.description: Composed production route: FAME -> basedflick -> ZORA -> WETH.

candidateSummary: Uses pinned single-leg FAME -> basedflick output as the exact V4 input amount.

routes.description: NativeWrap proof route: FAME -> WETH -> ETH.

candidateSummary: Uses existing FAME -> WETH liquidity, then unwraps all route-local WETH to native ETH.

routes.description: Aerodrome V2 proof route: USDC -> WETH -> FAME.

funding.justification: User-side USDC balance setup proves Aerodrome V2 connector liquidity without mutating venue pools.

candidateSummary: Uses Aerodrome V2 USDC -> WETH explicit-factory routing before existing WETH -> FAME liquidity.

routes.description: Production split-then-merge route: USDC splits into frxUSD through two venues, then merges to FAME.

funding.justification: User-side USDC balance setup avoids mutating venue pools or FAME DN404 accounting.

candidateSummary: Uses exact first branch amount and All for the remaining USDC and merged frxUSD balances.

routes.description: Reverse composed production route: USDC -> ZORA -> basedflick -> FAME.

funding.justification: User-side USDC balance setup avoids mutating venue pools or FAME DN404 accounting.

candidateSummary: Uses pinned single-leg USDC -> ZORA output as the exact V4 input amount.

routes.description: Production split route: WETH splits across Solidly and Uniswap V2 into final FAME.

candidateSummary: Uses exact first branch amount and All for the remaining WETH branch.
